articles.title: Graph augmented transformers improve chemotherapy toxicity symptom extraction from clinical notes
articles.description: Adverse events from chemotherapy are common; however, identifying related symptoms following these events from clinical documentation can be challenging. Here, the authors develop a natural language processing model to extract symptoms from clinical notes.
